---
name: Documentation update
about: Request improvements or corrections to docs.
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: ["documentation", "triage"]

---

## Documentation area

Which document/page/section needs updating?

## Current issue

What is incorrect, missing, or unclear?

## Suggested update

Describe what should be changed.

## Why this matters

Explain the impact on users/contributors.

## Additional context

Add links, screenshots, or examples.
